meaning: n.(蟒ｺ遲醍畑)遏ｳ閹冗~閭ｶ郤ｸ螟ｹ譚ｿ
examples: He had taken a summer job and was unloading some sheetrock at work.
The roof soon disappeared, throwing ceiling sheetrock and two-by-fours on top of my head.
Suddenly the lobby door crashed into the adjacent wall and stayed there, the knob half-buried in the Sheetrock.
In New Orleans, they're tearing down moldy sheetrock, clearing out festering carpets, patching up roofs.
Consider refinishing the walls in sheetrock, diamond plate metal or plain corrugated sheet metal.
